name: play_feedback
description: Play a feedback pattern using sound and/or vibration. Supports patterns like TAP, SIP, KEY, HOLD, etc.

pattern.description: Feedback pattern name: TAP, SIP, KEY0-KEY9, HOLD, HW_TAP, HW_HOLD, MESSAGE, EMAIL, WAKEUP, SCHEDULE, TIMER, GENERAL, POWERON, POWEROFF, CHARGERCONN, CHARGING_ERROR, FULLCHARGED, LOWBATT, LOCK, UNLOCK, VIBRATION_ON, SILENT_OFF, BT_CONNECTED, BT_DISCONNECTED
